hello: Hello! I am LOGBOT AI. How can I help you today?
hi: Hi! Welcome to LOGBOT AI Support.
hey: Hey! How can I help you?
who are you: I am LOGBOT AI, your IT Support Assistant.
what is logbot: LOGBOT is an AI-powered support chatbot.
what is lan: LAN stands for Local Area Network.
what is wan: WAN stands for Wide Area Network.
what is internet: The Internet is a global network connecting computers worldwide.
what is router: A Router connects networks and forwards data packets.
what is switch: A Switch connects devices inside a local network.
what is dns: DNS converts domain names into IP addresses.
what is ip address: An IP Address uniquely identifies a device on a network.
what is http: HTTP is the protocol used for web communication.
what is https: HTTPS is the secure version of HTTP.
reset password: Please contact IT Support or use the password reset portal.
vpn issue: Check your VPN credentials and internet connection.
email not working: Verify your email settings and network connection.
printer not working: Check printer power and network connectivity.
raise ticket: Use the Raise Ticket page to create a support ticket.
help: I can answer IT questions, search incidents and raise tickets.
